ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "traffic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data entry */,
  "data_year" INTEGER /* Year the traffic data was collected */,
  "nb_adt" INTEGER /* Northbound average daily traffic (NB ADT) */,
  "sb_adt" INTEGER /* Southbound average daily traffic (SB ADT) */,
  "adt" INTEGER /* Total average daily traffic (ADT) */,
  "nb_pm" INTEGER /* Northbound peak traffic (NB PM) */,
  "sb_pm" INTEGER /* Southbound peak traffic (SB PM) */,
  "nb_am" INTEGER /* Northbound morning traffic (NB AM) */,
  "sb_am" INTEGER /* Southbound morning traffic (SB AM) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where traffic data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic data was collected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, planner, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_types" (
  "traffic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic type */,
  "traffic_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the traffic type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_directions" (
  "traffic_direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic direction */,
  "traffic_direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic direction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic direction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic direction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic direction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_times" (
  "traffic_time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic time */,
  "traffic_time_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic time */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic time */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the traffic time interval */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the traffic time interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic time was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the traffic time was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_traffic_data" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "traffic_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report-traffic data association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report-traffic data association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id", "traffic_data_id")
)
